name: natural peach flavor
description: Provides peach flavor to food and beverage products.
raw_text: Peach Nectarine Naturally Flavored Sparkling Mountain Spring Water: CARBONATED MOUNTAIN SPRING WATER, NATURAL FLAVORS, PEACH JUICE CONCENTRATE, MALIC ACID, ESTER GUM, POTASSIUM BENZOATE (TO ENSURE FRESHNESS), SUCRALOSE, GREEN TEA EXTRACT, CALCIUM DISODIUM EDTA (TO PROTECT FLAVOR), BIOTIN 1% TRIT.
